# Portfolio Website Development

This is a Next.js portfolio website for Nikshith Nooka, showcasing AI/ML expertise, hackathon wins, internships, and technical skills.

## Tech Stack
- Next.js 14+ with App Router
- TypeScript
- Tailwind CSS
- Framer Motion (animations)
- React Icons

## Key Features
- Responsive dark-themed design
- Experience showcase
- Skills & certifications section
- Projects highlighting
- Contact information
- Social links integration
